name: Sachin Patel
bio: M.Sc. in Operations Research from IIT Bombay · Building optimization models, mathematical algorithms, and decision-support systems for complex real-world problems.
I develop optimization solutions, Python-based OR applications, and data-driven decision models across supply chain, logistics, scheduling, and resource optimization.

education.institution: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya College, University of Delhi

certifications.title: Data Science for Engineers · Elite Silver

bullets: Built Python-based ETL pipelines & automated data pipelines for GPS/operational datasets — eliminated manual Excel-heavy workflows
Wrote advanced SQL queries (CTEs, window functions, aggregations) on MongoDB & relational DBs for financial & operational reporting
Automated recurring finance reports & stakeholder data delivery — cut manual effort ~40%
Delivered optimisation models in production → up to 10% reduction in operational costs
Preprocessed large datasets with Python & SQL to boost analytics accuracy
Modelled routing solutions → ~10% reduction in vehicle usage

projects.title: EV Charging Grid Orchestration
projects.desc: Optimized EV charging station placement using demand clustering and mathematical optimization to maximize coverage under budget constraints.

projects.title: Dark Kitchen Delivery Zone Optimizer
projects.desc: Optimized dark kitchen locations using demand clustering and facility location optimization to improve delivery coverage and reduce operational costs.

projects.title: IPL Cricket Team Selector
projects.desc: Built a data-driven team selection engine that ranks players and generates the optimal playing XI under budget and role constraints.

projects.title: Dynamic Pricing Engine
projects.desc: Developed a pricing optimization model that recommends profit-maximizing product prices based on demand elasticity and market conditions.

projects.title: Hospital Bed & Staff Allocation Optimizer
projects.desc: Combined demand forecasting and workforce scheduling to optimize hospital staffing levels and resource allocation.

projects.title: LLM-Powered Operations Research Solver
projects.desc: Built an AI-powered system that converts natural language business problems into mathematical optimization models and solves them automatically.

projects.title: Automated Reporting Pipeline
projects.desc: End-to-end Python automation: Excel → parameterised SQL + Jupyter. Real-time trend & anomaly detection on financial datasets.

projects.title: Demand Forecasting — Walmart / M5
projects.desc: Product-store level forecasts modelling trends, seasonality & holidays with XGBoost on the M5 retail dataset.

projects.title: Fraud Detection on Financial Data
projects.desc: Classifiers on imbalanced transaction data; model choice aligned to business risk via ROC-AUC & Precision-Recall.

projects.title: Hospital Shift Scheduling
projects.desc: MILP model for 16-staff scheduling ensuring full coverage & labour-rule compliance using Pyomo + CBC.

projects.title: Kernel Method for CCA
projects.desc: M.Sc. thesis: kernel-based CCA extension capturing nonlinear correlations as an optimisation problem. Outperformed traditional CCA.

achievements.desc: All India Rank 60 → direct IIT Bombay admission.
